mapper.sql: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.from_station_id, fs.name_zh_tw AS from_station_name_zh_tw, t.to_station_id, ts.name_zh_tw AS to_station_name_zh_tw, t.fare_type, t.fare_price, t.transfer_count, t.routing_strategy, t.notes, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM [dbo].[user_trip_plans] t INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] fs ON fs.id = t.from_station_id INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] ts ON ts.id = t.to_station_id
mapper.select:
WHERE t.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[user_trip_plans] t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
WHERE t.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT user_id FROM [dbo].[user_trip_plans] WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[user_trip_plans] WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT mt.max_trip_plans FROM [dbo].[users] u INNER JOIN [dbo].[membership_tiers] mt ON mt.id = u.membership_tier_id WHERE u.id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [dbo].[user_trip_plans] (user_id, from_station_id, to_station_id, name, fare_type, fare_price, transfer_count, routing_strategy, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tripPlan.userId}, #{tripPlan.fromStationId}, #{tripPlan.toStationId}, #{tripPlan.name}, #{tripPlan.fareType}, #{tripPlan.farePrice}, #{tripPlan.transferCount}, #{tripPlan.routingStrategy}, #{tripPlan.notes}, #{tripPlan.createdAt}, #{tripPlan.updatedAt})
